---
name: Scientific Accuracy Report
about: Report concerns about scientific measurement accuracy
title: '[SCIENCE] '
labels: scientific
---

## Measurement Affected

Which measurement is affected? (RT, Consistency, Fatigue, Focus Score, etc.)

## Description

What accuracy concern do you have?

## Evidence

- Research papers or references
- Real-world data that contradicts current behavior
- Comparison with known benchmarks

## Current Behavior

What does FOCUS currently do?

## Expected Behavior

What should FOCUS do based on scientific evidence?

## Impact

How significant is this accuracy issue? (Critical / Moderate / Minor)

## Recommended ADR

Should this require a new ADR? If so, what should it cover?
